content: Two-workflow separation is standard: ci.yml (triggered on push/PR, runs check+lint+test on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest) and release.yml (triggered on v* tags, runs matrix build across all targets, then a separate release job with needs: [build]). This decouples fast feedback from slow cross-platform release builds. Job dependency: release job uses needs: [build] and downloads artifacts from the build matrix before calling softprops/action-gh-release.
